## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Related Issues

- Fixes #(issue number)
- Relates to #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Data Source Impact

- [ ] SOS Venezuela 2026
- [ ] Apoyo Venezuela

- [ ] No external data source impact

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Tested with `base44 dev` (if backend changes)
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` with no errors
- [ ] Ran `npm run typecheck` with no errors
- [ ] Verified on mobile viewport

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] No new CORS vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Input sanitization handled (if user input is displayed)
- [ ] No personal data exposure
